title: PipelineDefinition
description: Velocity SDLC pipeline — defines phase sequences for each work-type variant

version.description: Semantic version of this pipeline definition

description.description: Human-readable description of this pipeline configuration

phases.description: Phase definitions keyed by phase id

pipeline_variants.description: Map of work-type variant id to ordered phase id array

new-feature.description: Phase sequence for new feature work

bug-fix.description: Phase sequence for bug fix work

extend.description: Phase sequence for extending an existing feature

name.description: Display name shown at human gate presentation

owning_agent.description: Agent responsible for executing this phase

key_skills.description: Velocity skill ids to invoke during this phase

exit_artifact.description: Description of the primary artifact produced by this phase

gate_type.description: Type of exit gate for this phase

skippable.description: Whether this phase can be skipped with a justification

artifact_dir.description: Directory within .velocity/artifacts/ where phase artifacts are stored
